title: OrchestratorState
description: Authoritative current state for the orchestrator. Written after every run. A fresh orchestrator loading this file knows the full system state without reading chat history.

trace_id.description: Trace ID of the current run.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this state was generated.

active_stream.description: Active execution stream. 'main' in Phase 4; multi-stream deferred to Phase 5.

last_changed.description: Human-readable description of what changed last run.

evidence_freshness.description: mtime (ISO string) of each key artifact in context_dir. null if artifact missing.

evidence_tier.description: Memory tier classification (hot/warm/cold) for each artifact tracked in evidence_freshness. Optional field added in Phase 5.1.
